experience.title: Full Stack Developer Intern
bullets: Shipped multi-channel B2B AI agent (webhooks, WhatsApp, email, phone) with Claude Sonnet and RAG across 7 enterprise clients, 1,000+ orders

Built automated validation and human-in-the-loop QA layer; iterated on prompts and vector-store memory, raising precision across 1,000+ orders

projects.name: Internship Matcher (React + TypeScript, FastAPI, Claude, PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS S3)
bullets: Owned end-to-end platform at internshipmatcher.com: React + TypeScript frontend, FastAPI backend, multi-tier data layer (PostgreSQL, Redis, S3)
Designed dual-model Claude pipeline (Haiku 4.5 for skill extraction, Sonnet 4.5 for re-ranking top 30 to top 10) at 95%+ accuracy with SSE streaming
Parallel processing 30+ positions, 52% latency reduction (270s to 130s) via dynamic batching and prompt caching

projects.name: Sleep-PSG Scoring (React, FastAPI, MNE, Scikit-Learn, Redis, WebSockets)
bullets: Built automated PSG sleep-stage scoring platform with 98% time reduction (2+ hrs to under 2 min) and 83% balanced accuracy vs clinician labels
Async EEG pipeline (Redis + ARQ): distributed EDF parsing, spectral features, Scikit-Learn classifiers per patient
Sub-10ms WebSocket streaming to React dashboard rendering live EEG waveforms and hypnograms for QA review

projects.name: Cold Leads Agent (FastAPI, Claude Haiku + Sonnet, Cal.com, Linq, Postgres)
bullets: Built autonomous lead-qualification SMS agent for Bay Area real estate client: FSM-driven pipeline with intent classification and Cal.com auto-booking
Multi-service integration: HMAC-signed Linq SMS webhooks, Cal.com v2 booking, SendGrid escalation; dual-model Claude on async Postgres
Live in production, auto-booking qualified leads on Cal.com and saving ~5 hrs/week of manual outreach
